---
title: "Figure 5 (R vs IR, GAUSSIAN frame) distortion lines — how far IR ~ R for small Delta t and small N_ch"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Gaussian-frame twin of figure_5_RvsIR_distortion_lines: same figure but anchored on the analytic
Gaussian Fisher G_b (PSD by construction), so macro_R has NO FD-Fisher 0-sentinels even at N_ch=10 +
coarse Delta t (the gap the numerical version had at figures/data/433ed13). Data = figures/data/1c2ae6f
(the "_G" run, battery_sim_G, anchored at theta_sim -> keeps the at-truth misspecification AND the R-IR
contrast, unlike battery_pool which sits at each algo's optimum and washes both out).
Diagonal of each distortion matrix, per parameter (rows) x N_ch (cols, 10 | 100), colour = algorithm,
noise 0.1, x = Delta t * k_off. 95% bootstrap ribbon + 68% bar. log-log, reference 1 = no distortion.
NOTE (2026-07-10): the macro_R N_ch=10 battery_sim_G run is still in progress (N_ch=10 is the slowest);
until it lands the N_ch=10 column shows IR only. Re-render to fill R once the file appears.
ONE Rmd emits THREE PDFs (Gaussian Information / Gaussian Sample / Correlation distortion).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/1c2ae6f"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISE    <- "0.1"
ALGOS    <- c("macro_R", "macro_IR")
NCHS     <- c(10, 100)
REF      <- 1
LOGW_MAX <- 1.3                                # drop points whose 95% CI spans > ~20x (guard; G_b is PSD)

ALGO_COL <- c(R = "#009E73", IR = "#0072B2")   # canonical ALGO_COL (Okabe-Ito): R green, IR blue
ALGO_LAB <- c(macro_R = "R", macro_IR = "IR")

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

MATS <- list(
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Gaussian_Information_Distortion",
       title = "Gaussian information distortion (diagonal)", pdf = "Figure_5_RvsIR_G_info_distortion_lines.pdf"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Gaussian_Sample_Distortion",
       title = "Gaussian sample distortion (diagonal)",      pdf = "Figure_5_RvsIR_G_sample_distortion_lines.pdf"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion",
       title = "Correlation distortion (diagonal, shared frame)", pdf = "Figure_5_RvsIR_G_corr_distortion_lines.pdf"))
```

```{r read}
read_algo <- function(a) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_G_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim_G.csv", NSIM, a, NOISE)))
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>%
    filter(Num_ch %in% NCHS) %>% mutate(algo = a)
}
bsim <- map_dfr(ALGOS, read_algo)
```

```{r extractor}
per_param_diag <- function(df, comp) {
  df %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, statistic == "value",
           param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX,
           probit == "mean" |
             (probit == "quantile" & quantile_level %in% c(0.025, 0.16, 0.84, 0.975))) %>%
    mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)],
           q = case_when(probit == "mean"        ~ "m",
                         quantile_level == 0.025  ~ "lo95",
                         quantile_level == 0.16   ~ "lo68",
                         quantile_level == 0.84   ~ "hi68",
                         quantile_level == 0.975  ~ "hi95")) %>%
    group_by(algo, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, q) %>%
    summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = q, values_from = v) %>%
    mutate(across(c(m, lo95, lo68, hi68, hi95),
                  ~ if_else(algo == "macro_R" & m == 0, NA_real_, .))) %>%
    filter(is.finite(m), is.finite(lo95), is.finite(hi95), lo95 > 0,
           log10(hi95) - log10(lo95) <= LOGW_MAX) %>%
    mutate(algo  = factor(ALGO_LAB[algo], levels = c("R", "IR")),
           param = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
           Nch   = factor(paste0("N[ch] == ", Num_ch), levels = paste0("N[ch] == ", NCHS)))
}
```

```{r plot-fn}
breaks_around1 <- function(l) {
  v <- c(.2, .3, .5, .7, 1, 1.5, 2, 3, 5, 10, 30, 100)
  v[v >= min(l, na.rm = TRUE) & v <= max(l, na.rm = TRUE)]
}

plot_lines <- function(dd, title) {
  ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, m, colour = algo, fill = algo, group = algo)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = REF, colour = "grey70", linewidth = .3, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), alpha = .13, colour = NA) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo68, ymax = hi68), linewidth = .45, alpha = .7) +
    geom_line(linewidth = .5) +
    geom_point(size = 1) +
    facet_grid(param ~ Nch, scales = "free_y",
               labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed, Nch = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)) +
    scale_y_log10(breaks = breaks_around1) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = ALGO_COL, name = NULL) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ALGO_COL, name = NULL, guide = "none") +
    labs(x = expression(Delta * t %.% k[off]),
         y = "distortion factor  (1 = no distortion)", title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top",
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
}

build_one <- function(comp, title, pdf) {
  dd <- per_param_diag(bsim, comp)
  g  <- plot_lines(dd, title)
  ggsave(pdf, g, width = 6.6, height = 8.0)
  g
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 6.6, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
for (M in MATS) print(build_one(M$comp, M$title, M$pdf))
```
